programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: The creators of the documentary go to the Philippines.It is a country inhabited by over 100 million people and has over 7,600 islands, only a small part of which is inhabited.In the waters of the Pacific Ocean you can find coral reefs full of life.They are an ideal shelter for various animal species.An unprecedented wealth of fauna and flora can be found in the local equatorial forests.There are also numerous endemic species among them.In this delightful world, each island of the archipelago is different and hides phenomenal secrets.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER 4
programme.sub-title: Two heads are better than one

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: Wild Arabia: Season 1
programme.desc: The seas and deserts of Oman, despite the harsh conditions there, are characterized by a highly diverse fauna and flora.Together with local scientists, we will visit landscapes full of frankincense trees.This route is also a habitat for horned adders and tail-swishing lizards.We will visit sandy beaches where turtles appear.We will enter caves that are home to many species of fish.We will not forget about mammals.Together with researchers, we will look at the fauna of the Arabian Peninsula, including:long-jawed dolphins and whales.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed.

programme.title: Snakes in the City: Uncharted Compilation 6
Kingdom of The Polar Bears
programme.desc: In the face of ongoing changes in the Arctic caused by the climate catastrophe, polar bears had to adapt to new, unfavorable conditions.The creators of the program will use technologically advanced cameras to present the lives of these animals.Viewers will go on a unique journey with experienced bear tracker Dennis Compayre.He will travel through the wilderness of the Canadian province of Mantioba in search of places where the next generation of these extraordinary creatures will soon be born.After wandering and waiting in difficult conditions, the bears will finally emerge from the den.Compayre will capture the first moments of babies' lives in photos.

programme.title: Kalahari - Africa's Underground Desert
programme.desc: Life in the Kalahari depends on creatures hidden in the sand.Only the smartest and most persistent will survive, those who have found a way to live in extreme temperatures and constant scarcity.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 12 Compilations
programme.desc: Dr. Pol's team helps patients in critical condition and makes urgent appointments.Veterinarians are ready to intervene in difficult cases, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 12 Compilations
programme.desc: Dr. Pol's team helps patients in critical condition and makes urgent appointments.Veterinarians are ready to intervene in difficult cases, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 6
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team help animals in need.In the new series, the veterinary clinic staff will face many challenges, such as creating a hoof prosthesis or helping stressed cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 6
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team help animals in need.In the new series, the veterinary clinic staff will face many challenges, such as creating a hoof prosthesis or helping stressed cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: Wild Arabia: Season 1
programme.desc: The seas and deserts of Oman, despite the harsh conditions there, are characterized by a highly diverse fauna and flora.Together with local scientists, we will visit landscapes full of frankincense trees.This route is also a habitat for horned adders and tail-swishing lizards.We will visit sandy beaches where turtles appear.We will enter caves that are home to many species of fish.We will not forget about mammals.Together with researchers, we will look at the fauna of the Arabian Peninsula, including:long-jawed dolphins and whales.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vet: Appreciation Compilation 2023
Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: Wild Arabia: Season 1
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia's wildlife is highly adaptable to harsh and often extreme conditions.The organisms managed to survive even in areas scorched by the sun, full of dry air and toxic gases.Together we explore caves full of bones with rock art on the walls.The paintings feature local fauna: deadly scorpions, baboons, chameleons and endangered leopards.It is the persistence of nature and animals inhabiting these areas that reflects their true strength and beauty.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed.

programme.title: Perfect Predator
programme.desc: Majestic sharks are considered to be perfect predators.We will look at the most important stages of their evolution that have made them reign at the top of the food chain for millions of years.

programme.title: Snakes In The City: Snake Charmer
programme.desc: Siouxsie Gillet, a snake charmer, and her boyfriend Simon Keys save reptiles that are in trouble.The program will feature the most dramatic and funniest moments.

programme.title: Kingdom of The Polar Bears
programme.desc: In the face of ongoing changes in the Arctic caused by the climate catastrophe, polar bears had to adapt to new, unfavorable conditions.The creators of the program will use technologically advanced cameras to present the lives of these animals.Viewers will go on a unique journey with experienced bear tracker Dennis Compayre.He will travel through the wilderness of the Canadian province of Mantioba in search of places where the next generation of these extraordinary creatures will soon be born.After wandering and waiting in difficult conditions, the bears will finally emerge from the den.Compayre will capture the first moments of babies' lives in photos.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Woodlands
programme.desc: Eucalyptus forests are a refuge for parrots and platypuses.These vast areas are also inhabited by tree kangaroos.It turns out that the future of the ancient antipodean ecosystem is uncertain.

programme.title: Sardinien - Arche aus Stein
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Sea, as the only body of water in the world, has witnessed such intense, continuous and extensive climate changes, the merging of sea currents, the intertwining of ecosystems, nations, cultures, ideas and genes.About 40 million years ago, Sardinia broke away from the southern tip of Europe and began moving toward Africa.During its journey, the island, like a great rock ship, collected various passengers from land and sea.The creators of the documentary will talk about this second largest island in Italy, which is eagerly visited by holidaymakers.Its diverse coastline includes, among others, impressive cliffs and picturesque beaches.Viewers will see, among others, a colony of flamingos and the famous rock falcons.They will also visit donkeys from the island of Asinara, and wild boars, mouflons and griffon vultures in the forest.They will see the largest herd of wild horses in Europe and caves containing cave changelings and fossils of a species of giant deer that became extinct in Sardinia in the Stone Age.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.
